info.name: Parallel Programming API - Full Test
info.description:
Full Postman collection for the Parallel Programming Laravel API.

Recommended order:
1. Auth - Admin > Register Admin or Login Admin
2. Admin APIs > Admin Products > Create Product
3. Auth - User > Register User or Login User
4. Run the rest of the folders in order.

The collection stores tokens and created IDs automatically in collection variables.

urlencoded.value: Your order status has been updated.
Database lock contention under peak load.
